title: [Malwith Inn, Dining Room]
description: A few small tables fill the room, while a string of chandeliers occupy the ceiling above.  Chairs surround the tables, leaving just enough room between tables to allow people to pass between.  An elaborate wood hat and coat stand stands near the entrance.

wayto.28261: ;e table = "Lantern"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
